revision.content:
== Original Flowergear ==
[[Image:Bloominglabs-logo-nobg.png|frameless|border]]

At some point, [[JoesProjects | Joe]] made our cool blooming-gear logo. You are looking at it now, on the right.
If you want a really good SVG of the flowergear, maybe ask Joe.

== Bloominglabs with Flowergear ==
[[Image:Bloominglabs.png|frameless|border]]

If you want images like this, then just download and use that PNG. If you want a half-decent SVG I made of the flowergear, find it in [[:File:Bloominglabs-logo.zip this zip file]].

== With Final Frontier Font ==
[[File:Futuristic-logo.png|frameless|border]]

Created by [[User:Jtillots | Jenett]] with the font "[http://www.fontspace.com/allen-r-walden/final-frontier Final Frontier]".

=== Banner ===

[[Image:Bloominglabs-banner-300.png|frameless|border]]

[[:File:Export-banner.png|The full-size image]] is very large because it is 9 feet long and 120dpi.

After ILF 2011, we have our first real banner.



[[Daniel's_Projects | DAKMH]] reworked the gears for use as physical objects, including badges for the first Makevention (2013) and revised the logo to include those.  The versions based on that are:
*[[:File:Bloominglabs-logo_revised_flat.svg | flattened svg]]
*[[:File:Bloominglabs-logo_revised.png | 300 DPI .png]]
*[[:File:Bloominglabs-logo_revised.svg | Inkscape SVG]] (for editing; requires Final Frontier font)

== Current BloomingGear ==
[[Image: BloominglabsGearDeeperTeeth.png|frameless|border]]

Finally, DAKMH provided images of just the gear.

*[[:File:BloominglabsGearDeeperTeeth.png | as PNG]]
*[[:File:BloominglabsGearDeeperTeeth_purePaths_2a_alpha.png | as PNG with alpha]]
*[[:File:BloominglabsGearDeeperTeeth_purePaths_2a.svg | as SVG]]

== New Shirt Logo ==
[[Image: Bloominglabs-logo_ShirtPrint_test1f_large.png|frameless|border]]

In 2016, DAKMH designed an updated logo for Bloominglabs t-shirts.
*[[:File:Bloominglabs-logo_ShirtPrint_test1f_large.png | as PNG]]
*[[:File:Bloominglabs-logo_ShirtPrint_test1f.svg | as SVG]]

== Animated Logo ==
[[Image:Animated-logo-10fps.gif|frameless|border]]

Created by [[User:Avh.on1 | avh.on1]] in the wee hours of the morning on 4 July 2017 from [[#New Shirt Logo | DAKMH's new t-shirt logo]].
First, the gears in the logo were separated using [https://inkscape.org Inkscape].
Then the animation was created with [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Synchronized_Multimedia_Integration_Language SIML] by editing the svg file in a text editor.

The gif animation seen here was rendered in [http://anigen.org aniGen],
stitched in [https://imagej.net/Welcome ImageJ],
and optimized with [https://www.lcdf.org/gifsicle/ gifsicle].

Here is the [[:File:Animated-logo-siml.svg | original SVG file]].

Unfortunately, SIML may be killed off by Google in the future, so this may eventually need to be reimplemented using CSS or javascript.

== 2022 Banner ==
[[image:2022 Bloominglabs banner (created for 4th of July parade) reference image.gif|frameless|border]]
